# Horizon Care Services — Full Reference

## Company Overview

**Name:** Horizon Care Services Ltd
**Company No.:** 14615041
**ICO Registration:** Registered with the Information Commissioner's Office
**Office address:** 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Cheetham Hill, Manchester, M8 9LR
**Phone:** 020 3757 2767 (Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm)
**WhatsApp:** 020 3757 2767 (7 days a week)
**Email:** contact@horizoncareservices.org
**Website:** https://www.horizoncareservices.org
**Business type:** Healthcare staffing agency — registered office in Manchester; placements across England

Horizon Care Services is a healthcare staffing agency operating across England. We have been supplying skilled healthcare professionals for three years, building a track record with NHS trusts, local authorities, and care organisations who need reliable staff and consistent standards.

## Services

### Healthcare Staffing
URL: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/

We supply skilled healthcare professionals to care organisations, NHS trusts, and local authorities at short or extended notice. Roles include:

- Registered Nurses (RGN, RMN, RNLD)
- Healthcare Assistants
- Support Workers
- Social Workers
- Occupational Therapists
- Physiotherapists

Available 24/7, including weekends and bank holidays. We accommodate single-shift requests and long-term contracts. All staff are DBS-checked, professionally registered where required, and verified against the relevant professional registers (NMC, HCPC, SWE).

## Geographic Coverage

We operate in:
- Bedfordshire
- Buckinghamshire
- Cambridgeshire
- Hertfordshire
- Manchester
- London

We also work across England more broadly and regularly extend into new areas. Contact us if your location is not listed.

## Our Approach

### Careful Selection
We are selective about the professionals we place. Every candidate is interviewed, reference-checked, and compliance-verified before joining our register. We do not supply staff we would not be confident placing ourselves.

### Joined-Up Working
We work alongside NHS teams, social workers, and commissioning managers. We take responsibility for our part and communicate clearly with everyone else involved.

### Honest About Capacity
We tell commissioning teams what we can and cannot deliver — including timescales and coverage. We do not overcommit.

## For NHS and Local Authority Commissioning Teams

We understand the pressures discharge planners, social workers, and commissioning managers operate under. We respond to enquiries within 2 working days, provide clear written proposals, and keep commissioning bodies informed at every stage.

Commission services: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/referrals/
Contact: 020 3757 2767 or contact@horizoncareservices.org

## Writing and Guidance

We publish plain-English articles for referrers and healthcare professionals on our blog.

Blog index: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/blog/

### Home Care vs Care Home: Understanding the Difference
URL: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/blog/home-care-vs-care-home/

A practical guide to the difference between home care (support delivered in the person's own home) and a care home placement. Covers what each option involves, who each suits, and how to decide. Written for families and those helping someone make the decision.

## Careers

We recruit nurses, healthcare assistants, support workers, and allied health professionals for flexible agency work across England. We provide structured onboarding, ongoing training, and a named coordinator for every worker on our register.

Work for us: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/work-for-us/
